title: geranium alternans
intro: Geranium alternans, also known as the South African geranium, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its fragrant pink or white flowers and succulent stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Geranium alternans include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Geranium alternans can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for various applications and uses.
